---
title: Spring phenology tier2 project
author: Constantin Zohner
date: "last updated 2 March 2025"

subtitle: Extract MODIS land cover map at 0.5° resolution
output:
  html_document:
    highlight: haddock
    toc: false
    use_bookdown: true
    df_print: paged
    fig_caption: yes
---

<style>
body
  { counter-reset: source-line 0; }
pre.numberSource code
  { counter-reset: none; }
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  class.source = "numberLines lineAnchors"
  )
```

<br><br>

## 1. Load packages, set directories, and add functions

<details><summary>get packages</summary>
```{r, mesage=F, warning=F}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
```
</details>

<details><summary>set directories</summary>
```{r}
# path where individual MODIS HDF files are stored
modis_raw.dir <- "/Users/consti/Desktop/PhD/Data/Global_layers/Ecology_layers/MODIS_LandCover/MCD12Q1_061-20250301_131804"

# path where final map is stored
modis_out.dir <- "/Users/consti/Desktop/PhD/Data/Global_layers/Ecology_layers/MODIS_LandCover/Maps"
```
</details>

<details><summary>add functions</summary>
```{r}
# Function to filter MODIS HDF files by year
############################################

filter_modis_by_year <- function(modis_dir, years) {
  all_hdf_files <- list.files(path = modis_dir, pattern = "\\.hdf$", full.names = TRUE)
  
  # Extract year from filename (A2010, A2018, etc.)
  hdf_years <- sapply(all_hdf_files, function(f) {
    match <- regmatches(f, regexpr("A\\d{4}", f))  # Extract "A2018"
    as.integer(sub("A", "", match))  # Convert "A2018" → 2018
  })
  
  # Filter files based on year
  filtered_files <- all_hdf_files[hdf_years %in% years]
  return(filtered_files)
}


# Function to load the relevant MODIS land cover subdataset
###########################################################

load_modis_hdf <- function(hdf_path, dataset_index = 1) {    
  sds_list <- terra::sds(hdf_path)
  modis_raster_all <- terra::rast(sds_list)
  
  # Extract the correct dataset (e.g., LC_Type1)
  modis_raster <- terra::subset(modis_raster_all, dataset_index)
  return(modis_raster)
}
```
</details>

<br>

## 2. Load, reproject, and downsample land cover map

<details><summary>show code</summary>
```{r, mesage=F, warning=F}
# Get all MODIS HDF files for 2010
modis_2010_files <- filter_modis_by_year(modis_raw.dir, years = 2010)

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Load all MODIS HDF files
modis_rasters <- lapply(modis_2010_files, load_modis_hdf, dataset_index = 5) # 5 = PFT data (see user guide)

# Remove NULL values (if any)
modis_rasters <- Filter(Negate(is.null), modis_rasters)

# Merge MODIS rasters into one dataset
modis_merged <- do.call(terra::mosaic, modis_rasters)

# Plot merged raster (still in Sinusoidal projection)
plot(modis_merged, main = "Merged MODIS Land Cover (Sinusoidal)")

# -------------------- Reproject to WGS84 --------------------

modis_resampled_wgs84 <- terra::project(modis_merged, "EPSG:4326", method = "near")

# Check resolution & extent after reprojection
res(modis_resampled_wgs84)
ext(modis_resampled_wgs84)

# Plot the reprojected raster
plot(modis_resampled_wgs84, main = "MODIS Land Cover (0.0025° WGS84)")

# -------------------- Change Resolution to 0.5° --------------------

# A) First aggregation to 5km (0.025°) to speed up next steps
#############################################################

modis_downsampled_5km  <- terra::aggregate(modis_resampled_wgs84, fact = 10, fun = "modal")

# Check resolution
res(modis_downsampled_5km)


# B) Crop to ensure coordinate ranges are within bounds
#######################################################

# Define the valid extent
valid_extent <- ext(-180, 180, -90, 90)

# Only crop if the raster is out of valid bounds
current_extent <- ext(modis_downsampled_5km)
if (current_extent[1] < -180 || current_extent[2] > 180 || 
    current_extent[3] < -90 || current_extent[4] > 90) {
  
  message("Cropping raster to valid WGS84 extent...")
  modis_downsampled_5km <- terra::crop(modis_downsampled_5km, valid_extent)
}


# C) Set final resolution to 0.5° (~50 km grid)
###############################################

final_resolution <- 0.5  # 0.5 degrees ~ 50 km

# Create an empty raster template with desired resolution & extent
modis_target_grid <- terra::rast(ext=valid_extent, res=final_resolution, crs="EPSG:4326")  # Explicit CRS assignment

# Resample using "mode" (suitable for categorical data)
modis_downsampled_50km <- terra::resample(modis_downsampled_5km, modis_target_grid, method = "mode")  # correct method for land cover

# Check resolution
res(modis_downsampled_50km)

# Check extent
ext(modis_downsampled_50km)

# Plot the final raster
plot(modis_downsampled_50km, main = "MODIS Land Cover resampled to 0.5° (WGS84)")
```
</details>

<br>

## 3. Save final map

<details><summary>show code</summary>
```{r}
# Save the final raster as GeoTIFF
output_filepath <- file.path(modis_out.dir, "MODIS_PFT_2010_WGS84_0.5deg.tif")

terra::writeRaster(modis_downsampled_50km, 
                   filename = output_filepath, 
                   filetype = "GTiff", 
                   overwrite = TRUE)

message("Final MODIS land cover raster saved successfully!")
```
</details>

<br>

## 4. Reproducibility 

<details><summary>show code</summary>
```{r}
## datetime
Sys.time()

## session info
sessionInfo()
```
</details>
